case_title: ROBINSON AND ASSOCIATES VS BATMALE, WAYNE INDIVIDUALY DBA BAY AREA RENTALS

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO WAYNE BATMALE -BAY AREA RENTALS RETURNED SIGNED;

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROBINSON AND ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BATMALE, WAYNE INDIVIDUALY DBA BAY AREA RENTALS $1,624.63 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,650.63, THIS JUDGMENT IS SUBJECT TO A CREDIT OF $975 FOR DEFENDANT'S RECENT PAYMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,624.63 FILED BY ROBINSON AND ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT BATMALE, WAYNE INDIVIDUALY DBA BAY AREA RENTALS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BATMALE, WAYNE INDIVIDUALY DBA BAY AREA RENTALS
